description: Address security and validation issues from code review: (1) SSRF protection - validate URL scheme (https only) and reject private/link-local IP ranges, (2) Validate Bedrock output with validateRecipeInput before saving, (3) Add AbortSignal.timeout(8000) to fetch call, (4) Prompt injection mitigation with delimiters, (5) Client-side URL pattern validation.
steps: In apps/api/src/handler.ts importRecipe function, add URL scheme validation (https only) and private IP range rejection before fetching
In apps/api/src/handler.ts importRecipe function, add AbortSignal.timeout(8000) to the fetch call
In apps/api/src/handler.ts importRecipe function, run validateRecipeInput on parsed Bedrock JSON before saving to DynamoDB
In apps/api/src/handler.ts buildBedrockPrompt function, wrap pageContent in delimiters and instruct model to treat it as data only
In apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-import.component.ts, add Validators.pattern with URL regex to the form control
acceptance_criteria: importRecipe rejects non-https URLs with 400 status
importRecipe rejects URLs pointing to private/link-local IP ranges with 400 status
Bedrock output is validated with validateRecipeInput before DynamoDB write
buildBedrockPrompt wraps pageContent in explicit delimiters with data-only instruction
Angular form has URL pattern validator that requires https:// prefix
verification: Run pnpm nx build api && pnpm nx build web and confirm both compile without errors
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. Both pnpm nx build api and pnpm nx build web pass successfully. SSRF protection uses URL parsing and IP range checks. Bedrock output validation reuses the existing validateRecipeInput function. Prompt injection mitigation uses PAGE_CONTENT delimiters with explicit data-only instruction. Client-side adds pattern validator requiring https:// prefix with error message display.
